allow: Bash(node -e "const models = require\('./src/models'\); console.log\('Loaded models:', Object.keys\(models\).filter\(k => k !== 'sequelize' && k !== 'Sequelize'\).sort\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('./src/models'\); m.permissaoPerfil.findAll\({where:{perfil:'contratada_scmc'}}\).then\(r=>{ console.log\('contratada_scmc rows:', r.length\); r.forEach\(x=>console.log\('  ', x.modulo, x.escopo\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.error\(e\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('./src/models'\); m.permissaoPerfil.findAll\(\).then\(r=>{ const byPerfil={}; r.forEach\(x=>{byPerfil[x.perfil]=\(byPerfil[x.perfil]||0\)+1;}\); console.log\('Total rows:', r.length\); Object.entries\(byPerfil\).sort\(\).forEach\(\([p,c]\)=>console.log\(\\`  \\${p}: \\${c}\\`\)\); const noUUID=r.filter\(x=>!x.perm_id\).length; console.log\('Rows missing perm_id:', noUUID\); }\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const {authorize, verificarAcessoUnidade, checkPermission} = require\('./src/middlewares/rbac'\); console.log\(typeof checkPermission\);")
